struct_node_list.operation:
enum operator
  {
    /* Without arguments:  */
    var,			/* The variable "n".  */
    num,			/* Decimal number.  */
    /* Unary operators:  */
    lnot,			/* Logical NOT.  */
    /* Binary operators:  */
    mult,			/* Multiplication.  */
    divide,			/* Division.  */
    module,			/* Modulo operation.  */
    plus,			/* Addition.  */
    minus,			/* Subtraction.  */
    less_than,			/* Comparison.  */
    greater_than,		/* Comparison.  */
    less_or_equal,		/* Comparison.  */
    greater_or_equal,		/* Comparison.  */
    equal,			/* Comparison for equality.  */
    not_equal,			/* Comparison for inequality.  */
    land,			/* Logical AND.  */
    lor,			/* Logical OR.  */
    /* Ternary operators:  */
    qmop			/* Question mark operator.  */
  }
